introSection: Ladybird is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer currently located at Wicksteed Park in Kettering, Northamptonshire, England, UK. It opened at the park for the 1994 season.
fullText:
Ladybird is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer currently located at Wicksteed Park in Kettering, Northamptonshire, England, UK. It opened at the park for the 1994 season.



Green track and supports.
